title: Trigger a notification after 4 hours of an item being created
excerpt: Trigger a notification after 4 hours of an item being created

posts.author: VaniTenant (Vani)
posts.cookedHtml: Trigger a notification after 4 hours of an item being created

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can set up an automation in monday.com to trigger a notification 4 hours after an item is created by following these steps:

  1. Go to your board where you want the automation.
  2. Click on Automate (top-right corner).
  3. Click Create Custom Automation.
  4. Set the trigger as:
    5.*“When an item is created”**
  5. Add an action:
    7.*“Wait 4 hours”**
  6. Add another action:
    9.*“Then notify [Person/Team]”** (Choose who should be notified and customize the message).

Alternatively, you can use a built-in automation like:
“When an item is created, wait X hours, then notify someone.”

This should do exactly what you need!

If this helped, please leave me a like!
